OpenAI.notes: Use official OpenAI model docs or authenticated model-list API if credentials are explicitly available.

Claude.notes: Anthropic documents current model IDs and aliases on the models page.

Gemini.notes: Use Gemini API model docs or official list models API.

MistralAI.notes: Use Mistral model overview and API docs.

Qwen.notes: Use Alibaba Cloud Model Studio model docs.

DeepSeek.notes: Use DeepSeek API docs and pricing/model page.

Moonshot.notes: Use Kimi/Moonshot official API docs, models page, or authenticated list-models API.

OpenRouter.notes: OpenRouter is itself the provider/catalog; prefer its API for additions/removals.

Siliconflow.notes: Use SiliconFlow official model-list API docs.

Ollama.notes: Ollama catalogs are user-extensible; avoid removals unless an exact official preset is confirmed retired.

HuggingFace.notes: Hugging Face is an open catalog; avoid removals without exact official evidence.

Meta.notes: Use Meta Llama model docs for direct Meta presets.

BAAI.notes: Use BAAI official organization pages or model docs.

AliCloud.notes: Use Alibaba Cloud official model docs.

PPIO.notes: Use PPIO official docs; verify the exact model page during each run.

AntLing.notes: Use Ant Ling developer docs and official model-family pages.

Moka.notes: Registered provider has no local models yet; keep empty unless official provider docs are found for a concrete addition.

Other.notes: Generic provider bucket; do not remove models from this provider based on external catalogs.
